class_probability_threshold.description: If any filter class probability reaches this threshold, the point is excluded from the filtered output cloud.

classes.description: Class names to filter out from the filtered output cloud when their probability exceeds the threshold.

output_format.description: Filtered output point format. Empty string preserves the input format.

plugins_path.description: A path to the TensorRT plugins.

cloud_capacity.description: Capacity of the point cloud buffer (should be set to at least the maximum theoretical number of points).

source_reconstruction.description: Controls whether voxel predictions are mapped back to source points. 'none' publishes voxel representative points; 'partial' publishes cropped source points inside point_cloud_range; 'full' publishes the full input cloud, assigning unknown label 255 and zero class probabilities to points outside point_cloud_range.

onnx_path.description: A path to ONNX model file.

engine_path.description: A path to TensorRT engine file.
